topic: India youth group cancels march due to police concerns
headline: COCKROACH JANTA PARTY CALLS OFF MARCH TO PARLIAMENT AFTER POLICE EXPRESS CONCERNS OVER VIOLENCE FEARS
summary: A youth group in India, the Cockroach Janta Party, canceled a planned march to Parliament due to concerns from police. The group had been protesting against the Union Education Minister over alleged exam irregularities. Thousands of people had taken part in a previous march, which saw clashes between demonstrators and police. The incident has raised questions about the right to protest in India and the limits of this right.
